info.title: FlashOWare.Tool
info.description: A .NET tool that facilitates development workflows.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

commands.name: check
commands.description: Show whether experimental interceptors are supported or not by discovered .NET SDKs.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Find and list experimental interceptors in a C# project.

commands.name: using
commands.description: Analyze or refactor C# using directives.

commands.name: count
commands.description: Count and list the top-level using directives of a C# project.

arguments.name: USINGS
arguments.description: The names of the top-level using directives to count. If usings are not specified, the command will list all top-level directives.

commands.name: globalize
commands.description: Move top-level using directives to global using directives in a C# project.

arguments.name: USINGS
arguments.description: The names of the top-level using directives to convert to global using directives. If usings are not specified, the command will globalize all top-level directives.
